flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Laurel Ridge Community College fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (29.1% → 24.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Laurel Ridge Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Laurel Ridge Community College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (59.5% → 68.7%).
